subject: Mathematics
strengths: Strong at solving linear equations and basic algebra.
weaknesses: Struggles with quadratic word problems and factoring.
suggestedPath: AI suggestion: Spend 2 weeks on factoring drills (Khan Academy), then practice 5 quadratic word problems daily. Re-test in 3 weeks.

subject: Physics
strengths: Good grasp of Newton's laws conceptually.
weaknesses: Calculation errors in force diagrams under friction.
suggestedPath: AI suggestion: Review free-body diagrams, complete the 'Forces & Friction' worksheet, and join Saturday revision class.
